name: Alliance Recovery Corporation
summary: Alliance Recovery Corporation, a development stage company, develops resource recovery technologies to convert industrial and other waste materials into fuel oil, gases, and other commodities. It focuses on converting industrial and other waste materials into electrical energy for sale to industrial entities or into local power grids, and to produce for re-sale by-products, including carbon black, steel, and steam and/or hot water. The company was formerly known as American Resource Recovery Group, Ltd. and changed its name to Alliance Recovery Corporation in 2002. Alliance Recovery Corporation was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Wilmington, Delaware.
